---
title: "index"
author: "Wells"
date: "2026-02-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(googlesheets4)
library(janitor)
```

#Import
```{r}
census1 <- read_csv("input/census_data/1930 cheltenham census 1.csv")
census2 <- read_csv("input/census_data/1930 cheltenham census 2.csv")
census3 <- read_csv("input/census_data/1930 cheltenham census 3.csv")
census4 <- read_csv("input/census_data/1930 cheltenham census 4.csv")
```
combine
```{r}

census_1930 <- rbind(census1, census2, census3, census4) |> 
  clean_names() |> 
   subset(select = -c(1:6)) |> 
  slice(-c(1))

```

analytics
```{r}

census_1930 |> 
  count(relationship_to_head)

```
